author: doll-agent
content: Implemented via blanket-impl traits ClassifierScore<F> and RegressorScore<F> in lib.rs, both blanket-impld over T: Predict<Array2<F>, Output=...>. Every fitted classifier (Output=Array1<usize>) and every fitted regressor (Output=Array1<F>) automatically gets a .score(x, y) method returning mean accuracy / R² respectively. Mirrors sklearn ClassifierMixin.score / RegressorMixin.score. Users import the trait via use ferrolearn_linear::ClassifierScore; (or RegressorScore). Single edit covers all ~30 fitted estimators in the crate; mean_accuracy and r2_score live as private helpers in lib.rs. All 498 tests pass.
